---
Inspired by this article

* https://www.newsbusters.org/blogs/nb/erick-erickson/2026/04/10/there-must-be-more-stop-status-quo

> *In Western Civilization, Christian ethics still, in some ways, dominate society. Murder is wrong. Stealing is wrong. Lying is wrong. Iran is dominated by Shiite Muslims who, at heart, embrace Taqiyya, or religious dissimulation, in ways Sunni Muslims tend to reject. It is why more must be done to Iran.*

> ***Taqiyya***, *in practice, means lying to the infidel. The Hadith, or traditions of the prophet, says “war is deceit,” and commanders may use lies to advance their cause. The Iranian regime outmaneuvered the Obama administration with peace talks. To this day, Democrats insist Iran was not building a nuclear weapon, but Iran was clearly building a nuclear weapon. The regime lies to the West.*

---
You're not going to deprogram them, or even get them to accept they've been proven wrong.  They're immovable, but not immutable.  Trying to change their minds is tilting at windmills, like donkey hotay.    

So like a chi gung or aikido master, you have to redirect them.

Take the time to turn their TACO Trump meme into TAQ-IYYA meme, so that you educate them on the dangers of Islam, and suggest that Taco Trumpy is a secretly an Islamic.   And that makes him gleefully lie to you all the time.

In other words, use their Hate against them.

> YOU: "Trump tweeted "Praise be to Allah" on Easter....therefore he's secretly islamic.  And Islamics think it's right and just to lie to the infidel.  Trump is a liar, who lies like he breathes, wouldn't you agree?  So its not TACO trump, its TAQIYYA Trump"

The argument is indefensible, especially if your'e a crazy person.

> THEM: But wasn't Trump being sarcastic?

> YOU:  I thought you said Trump was a retard.  Then, years later, you said he's demented, ignoring how Biden was.  Is a demented retard capable of sarcasm?  I think they aren't.  No.  Trump is a demented retard Islamic, and that is final  Now go.  Go and tell all your friends.

The regime lies to the West.

You're not going to deprogram them, or even get them to accept they've been proven wrong. They're immovable, but not immutable. Trying to change their minds is tilting at windmills, like donkey hotay.

So like a chi gung or aikido master, you have to redirect them.

In other words, use their Hate against them.

YOU: "Trump tweeted "Praise be to Allah" on Easter....therefore he's secretly islamic. And Islamics think it's right and just to lie to the infidel. Trump is a liar, who lies like he breathes, wouldn't you agree? So its not TACO trump, its TAQIYYA Trump"

The argument is indefensible, especially if your'e a crazy person.
